steps: Original price = £80. First reduction: 15% off means paying 85% of original. Price after first reduction = 80 × 0.85 = £68. Second reduction: 20% off the reduced price means paying 80% of that price. Price after second reduction = 68 × 0.80 = £54.40. Fraction of original price = 54.40 / 80 = 5440/8000 = simplify by dividing numerator and denominator by 80: 5440 ÷ 80 = 68, 8000 ÷ 80 = 100 → 68/100 = simplify by dividing by 4: 68 ÷ 4 = 17, 100 ÷ 4 = 25 → 17/25. Check options: 17/25 is option A.
